rationale: In the citing paper, Roehm and Tybout (2006) appears as one entry in a comparison table of related crisis/spillover research used to distinguish brand safety from other reputational risk domains. The paper does not give this source a distinct role in hypothesis development, mechanism construction, or empirical design beyond broad background positioning. Its use is therefore a literature-list style contextual mention rather than a specific building block for the new framework.
